INV-ME_29b_BBG24_V1.0

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference INV-ME_29b_BBG24_V1.0_20220622T141759.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 18DADFF1
Receive ID 18DAF1DF
Functional Addr DF
Functional Name INV-ME_29b

    "supplier": "ShanghaiEDRIVE",
    "soft": "INVSW450",
    "version": "INVSW100.V001"
